---
title: "Transnational Party Organisation"
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(dplyr)
library(jsonlite)
library(readxl)
library(htmltools)
library(sf)

data_dir <- "data"
logo_dir <- "logos"
logo_thumb_dir <- file.path(logo_dir, "thumbs")
dir.create(logo_thumb_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

find_data_file <- function() {
  candidates <- list.files(
    data_dir,
    pattern = "\\.(xlsx|xls|csv)$",
    full.names = TRUE,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  )

  candidates <- candidates[!grepl("parties_template\\.csv$", candidates, ignore.case = TRUE)]
  if (length(candidates) > 0) return(candidates[[1]])

  template <- file.path(data_dir, "parties_template.csv")
  if (file.exists(template)) return(template)

  NA_character_
}

standardise_name <- function(x) {
  x <- iconv(trimws(as.character(x)), from = "", to = "ASCII//TRANSLIT")
  x <- tolower(x)
  gsub("[^a-z0-9]+", "_", x)
}

slugify <- function(...) {
  parts <- list(...)
  slug <- do.call(paste, c(lapply(parts, standardise_name), sep = "_"))
  gsub("(^_+|_+$)", "", gsub("_+", "_", slug))
}

find_logo_path <- function(logo_file, country, region, party) {
  valid_logo_file <- function(path) {
    if (!file.exists(path) || file.info(path)$size <= 100) return(FALSE)
    ext <- tolower(tools::file_ext(path))
    if (ext %in% c("png", "jpg", "jpeg", "webp")) return(TRUE)
    header <- readChar(path, nchars = min(200, file.info(path)$size), useBytes = TRUE)
    isTRUE(!grepl("<!doctype html|<html", header, ignore.case = TRUE))
  }

  explicit_path <- file.path(logo_dir, logo_file)
  if (!is.na(logo_file) && logo_file != "" && valid_logo_file(explicit_path)) {
    return(explicit_path)
  }

  slug <- slugify(country, region, party)
  candidates <- list.files(
    logo_dir,
    pattern = paste0("^", slug, "\\.(svg|png|jpg|jpeg|webp)$"),
    full.names = TRUE,
    ignore.case = TRUE
  )

  candidates <- candidates[vapply(candidates, valid_logo_file, logical(1))]

  if (length(candidates) > 0) candidates[[1]] else ""
}

make_logo_thumb <- function(path, slug) {
  if (is.na(path) || path == "" || !file.exists(path) || !requireNamespace("magick", quietly = TRUE)) {
    return(path)
  }

  thumb_path <- file.path(logo_thumb_dir, paste0(slug, ".png"))
  site_thumb_path <- file.path("_site", thumb_path)
  copy_thumb_to_site <- function() {
    dir.create(dirname(site_thumb_path), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
    if (file.exists(thumb_path)) {
      file.copy(thumb_path, site_thumb_path, overwrite = TRUE)
    }
  }

  if (
    file.exists(thumb_path) &&
    file.info(thumb_path)$size > 100 &&
    file.info(thumb_path)$mtime >= file.info(path)$mtime
  ) {
    copy_thumb_to_site()
    return(thumb_path)
  }

  ok <- tryCatch({
    img <- magick::image_read(path)[1]
    img <- magick::image_trim(img)
    img <- magick::image_resize(img, "222x178")
    img <- magick::image_extent(img, "256x256", gravity = "center", color = "white")
    magick::image_write(img, thumb_path, format = "png")
    TRUE
  }, error = function(e) FALSE)

  if (ok && file.exists(thumb_path) && file.info(thumb_path)$size > 100) {
    copy_thumb_to_site()
    thumb_path
  } else {
    path
  }
}

pick_column <- function(df, preferred, fallback_index = NULL) {
  names_std <- standardise_name(names(df))
  preferred_std <- standardise_name(preferred)
  hit <- match(preferred_std, names_std)
  hit <- hit[!is.na(hit)]
  if (length(hit) > 0) return(names(df)[hit[[1]]])
  starts <- unlist(lapply(preferred_std, function(p) {
    which(names_std == p | startsWith(names_std, paste0(p, "_")))
  }))
  if (length(starts) > 0) return(names(df)[starts[[1]]])
  if (!is.null(fallback_index) && ncol(df) >= fallback_index) return(names(df)[[fallback_index]])
  NA_character_
}

read_party_data <- function(path) {
  if (is.na(path)) {
    return(tibble::tibble(
      country = character(),
      region = character(),
      party = character(),
      party_abbr = character(),
      physical_level = character(),
      formalisation_level = character(),
      incorporation_level = character(),
      digital_level = character(),
      logo_file = character(),
      notes = character()
    ))
  }

  ext <- tolower(tools::file_ext(path))
  if (ext %in% c("xlsx", "xls")) {
    sheets <- readxl::excel_sheets(path)
    sheet <- if ("Main Database" %in% sheets) "Main Database" else sheets[[1]]
    preview <- readxl::read_excel(path, sheet = sheet, col_names = FALSE, n_max = 15)
    header_row <- which(apply(as.data.frame(preview), 1, function(row) {
      vals <- tolower(trimws(as.character(row)))
      any(vals == "party", na.rm = TRUE) && any(vals == "level", na.rm = TRUE)
    }))
    if (length(header_row) == 0) header_row <- 1 else header_row <- header_row[[1]]
    readxl::read_excel(path, sheet = sheet, skip = header_row - 1)
  } else {
    read.csv(path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
  }
}

infer_sections <- function(df, party_col) {
  if (is.na(party_col) || !party_col %in% names(df)) return(df)

  party_values <- trimws(as.character(df[[party_col]]))
  current_country <- NA_character_
  current_region <- NA_character_
  inferred_country <- character(nrow(df))
  inferred_region <- character(nrow(df))
  is_section <- logical(nrow(df))

  for (i in seq_len(nrow(df))) {
    value <- party_values[[i]]
    value_std <- tolower(value)

    if (!is.na(value_std) && value_std %in% c("netherlands", "switzerland", "austria", "germany", "belgium fr", "belgium fl")) {
      is_section[[i]] <- TRUE
      if (value_std == "belgium fr") {
        current_country <- "Belgium"
        current_region <- "Wallonia"
      } else if (value_std == "belgium fl") {
        current_country <- "Belgium"
        current_region <- "Flanders"
      } else {
        current_country <- dplyr::case_when(
          value_std == "netherlands" ~ "Netherlands",
          value_std == "switzerland" ~ "Switzerland",
          value_std == "austria" ~ "Austria",
          value_std == "germany" ~ "Germany",
          TRUE ~ value
        )
        current_region <- current_country
      }
    }

    inferred_country[[i]] <- current_country
    inferred_region[[i]] <- current_region
  }

  df$.country_inferred <- inferred_country
  df$.region_inferred <- inferred_region
  df$.is_section_row <- is_section
  df
}

source_file <- find_data_file()
raw_parties <- read_party_data(source_file)

country_col <- pick_column(raw_parties, c("country", "country_name", "state", "land"))
region_col <- pick_column(raw_parties, c("region", "language_region", "constituency", "area"))
party_col <- pick_column(raw_parties, c("party", "party_name", "name", "political_party"))
raw_parties <- infer_sections(raw_parties, party_col)
if (is.na(country_col) && ".country_inferred" %in% names(raw_parties)) country_col <- ".country_inferred"
if (is.na(region_col) && ".region_inferred" %in% names(raw_parties)) region_col <- ".region_inferred"
abbr_col <- pick_column(raw_parties, c("party_abbr", "abbr", "abbreviation", "short_name", "party_short"))
physical_col <- pick_column(raw_parties, c("physical_level", "physical", "physical_infrastructure", "transnationalisation", "transnationalization", "level", "column_h"), fallback_index = 8)
formalisation_col <- pick_column(raw_parties, c("formalisation_level", "formalization_level", "degree_of_formalisation", "degree_of_formalization", "formalisation", "formalization"), fallback_index = 19)
incorporation_col <- pick_column(raw_parties, c("incorporation_level", "degree_of_incorporation", "degree_of_incorproation", "incorporation", "incorproation"), fallback_index = 27)
digital_col <- pick_column(raw_parties, c("digital_level", "social_media_level", "digital", "social_media"), fallback_index = 34)
logo_col <- pick_column(raw_parties, c("logo_file", "logo", "logo_path", "image", "image_file"))
notes_col <- pick_column(raw_parties, c("notes", "placeholder", "description", "comment"))
lat_col <- pick_column(raw_parties, c("lat", "latitude"))
lon_col <- pick_column(raw_parties, c("lon", "lng", "longitude"))

get_col <- function(df, col, default = NA_character_) {
  if (!is.na(col) && col %in% names(df)) return(df[[col]])
  rep(default, nrow(df))
}

normalise_degree <- function(x) {
  x <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
  dplyr::case_when(
    x %in% c("low", "laag", "l", "1") ~ "low",
    x %in% c("medium", "mid", "moderate", "middel", "midden", "gemiddeld", "m", "2") ~ "medium",
    x %in% c("high", "hoog", "h", "3") ~ "high",
    TRUE ~ "unknown"
  )
}

normalise_country <- function(x) {
  x0 <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
  dplyr::case_when(
    x0 %in% c("netherlands", "the netherlands", "nederland", "nl") ~ "Netherlands",
    x0 %in% c("belgium", "belgie", "belgië", "be") ~ "Belgium",
    x0 %in% c("switzerland", "swiss", "schweiz", "suisse", "svizzera", "ch") ~ "Switzerland",
    x0 %in% c("austria", "oostenrijk", "at") ~ "Austria",
    x0 %in% c("germany", "duitsland", "de") ~ "Germany",
    TRUE ~ as.character(x)
  )
}

normalise_region <- function(region, country) {
  r0 <- tolower(trimws(as.character(region)))
  c0 <- normalise_country(country)
  dplyr::case_when(
    c0 == "Belgium" & r0 %in% c("flanders", "flemish", "vlaanderen", "vlaams", "dutch-speaking", "dutch speaking") ~ "Flanders",
    c0 == "Belgium" & r0 %in% c("wallonia", "walloon", "wallonie", "wallonie-bruxelles", "french-speaking", "french speaking") ~ "Wallonia",
    c0 == "Belgium" & r0 %in% c("", "na", "unknown") ~ "Flanders",
    c0 == "Netherlands" ~ "Netherlands",
    c0 == "Switzerland" ~ "Switzerland",
    TRUE ~ as.character(region)
  )
}

parties <- tibble::tibble(
  country = normalise_country(get_col(raw_parties, country_col)),
  region = normalise_region(get_col(raw_parties, region_col, ""), get_col(raw_parties, country_col)),
  party = as.character(get_col(raw_parties, party_col, "Unnamed party")),
  party_abbr = as.character(get_col(raw_parties, abbr_col, "")),
  physical_level = normalise_degree(get_col(raw_parties, physical_col)),
  formalisation_level = normalise_degree(get_col(raw_parties, formalisation_col)),
  incorporation_level = normalise_degree(get_col(raw_parties, incorporation_col)),
  digital_level = normalise_degree(get_col(raw_parties, digital_col)),
  logo_file = as.character(get_col(raw_parties, logo_col, "")),
  notes = as.character(get_col(raw_parties, notes_col, "")),
  lat = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(get_col(raw_parties, lat_col, NA_real_))),
  lon = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(get_col(raw_parties, lon_col, NA_real_)))
) |>
  bind_cols(is_section_row = if (".is_section_row" %in% names(raw_parties)) raw_parties$.is_section_row else FALSE) |>
  filter(!is_section_row) |>
  filter(!is.na(party), party != "") |>
  filter(!country %in% c("Austria", "Germany")) |>
  filter(country %in% c("Netherlands", "Belgium", "Switzerland")) |>
  mutate(
    region = if_else(country == "Belgium" & !region %in% c("Flanders", "Wallonia"), "Flanders", region),
    party_abbr = if_else(is.na(party_abbr) | party_abbr == "", substr(party, 1, 3), party_abbr),
    logo_slug = slugify(country, region, party),
    raw_logo_path = mapply(find_logo_path, logo_file, country, region, party, USE.NAMES = FALSE),
    logo_path = mapply(make_logo_thumb, raw_logo_path, logo_slug, USE.NAMES = FALSE),
    id = paste0("party-", row_number())
  )

anchor_points <- tibble::tibble(
  country = c("Netherlands", "Belgium", "Belgium", "Switzerland"),
  region = c("Netherlands", "Flanders", "Wallonia", "Switzerland"),
  anchor_lat = c(52.18, 51.05, 50.30, 46.85),
  anchor_lon = c(5.25, 4.20, 4.75, 8.20)
)

spread_parties <- function(df) {
  if (nrow(df) == 0) return(df)
  df |>
    group_by(country, region) |>
    mutate(
      slot = row_number(),
      total = n(),
      angle = (slot - 1) * 2 * pi / pmax(total, 1),
      radius = 0.18 + 0.08 * floor((slot - 1) / 8),
      lat = if_else(is.na(lat), first(anchor_lat) + radius * sin(angle), lat),
      lon = if_else(is.na(lon), first(anchor_lon) + radius * cos(angle), lon)
    ) |>
    ungroup() |>
    select(-slot, -total, -angle, -radius, -anchor_lat, -anchor_lon)
}

parties <- parties |>
  left_join(anchor_points, by = c("country", "region")) |>
  spread_parties()

party_json <- jsonlite::toJSON(parties, dataframe = "rows", auto_unbox = TRUE, na = "null")
source_label <- if (is.na(source_file)) "No data file found" else source_file

svg_num <- function(x) format(round(x, 1), scientific = FALSE, trim = TRUE)

polygon_path <- function(geom) {
  polygons <- suppressWarnings(st_cast(st_sfc(geom, crs = st_crs(geom)), "POLYGON"))
  paste(vapply(seq_along(polygons), function(i) {
    coords <- st_coordinates(polygons[[i]])
    ring_id <- coords[, "L1"]
    paste(vapply(split(as.data.frame(coords), ring_id), function(ring) {
      paste0(
        "M ", svg_num(ring$X[[1]]), " ", svg_num(-ring$Y[[1]]), " ",
        paste(paste0("L ", svg_num(ring$X[-1]), " ", svg_num(-ring$Y[-1])), collapse = " "),
        " Z"
      )
    }, character(1)), collapse = " ")
  }, character(1)), collapse = " ")
}

line_path <- function(geom) {
  lines <- suppressWarnings(st_cast(st_sfc(geom, crs = st_crs(geom)), "LINESTRING"))
  paste(vapply(seq_along(lines), function(i) {
    coords <- st_coordinates(lines[[i]])
    paste0(
      "M ", svg_num(coords[1, "X"]), " ", svg_num(-coords[1, "Y"]), " ",
      paste(paste0("L ", svg_num(coords[-1, "X"]), " ", svg_num(-coords[-1, "Y"])), collapse = " ")
    )
  }, character(1)), collapse = " ")
}

map_flag_svg <- function(area_id, x, y) {
  flag_w <- 60000
  flag_h <- 40000
  gap <- 6000
  x <- as.numeric(x)
  y <- as.numeric(y)

  local_flag <- function(path) {
    sprintf(
      '<image class="map-flag-image" href="%s" x="0" y="0" width="%s" height="%s" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice"></image>',
      htmlEscape(path),
      svg_num(flag_w),
      svg_num(flag_h)
    )
  }

  flag_group <- function(offset_x, content, label, width = flag_w, height = flag_h) {
    sprintf(
      '<g class="map-flag" transform="translate(%s %s)" aria-label="%s">
        <rect class="map-flag-frame" x="0" y="0" width="%s" height="%s" rx="7000" ry="7000"></rect>
        %s
      </g>',
      svg_num(offset_x),
      svg_num(-height / 2),
      htmlEscape(label),
      svg_num(width),
      svg_num(height),
      content
    )
  }

  nl_flag <- sprintf(
    '<rect class="flag-red" x="0" y="0" width="%s" height="%s"></rect>
     <rect class="flag-white" x="0" y="%s" width="%s" height="%s"></rect>
     <rect class="flag-blue" x="0" y="%s" width="%s" height="%s"></rect>',
    svg_num(flag_w), svg_num(flag_h / 3),
    svg_num(flag_h / 3), svg_num(flag_w), svg_num(flag_h / 3),
    svg_num(flag_h * 2 / 3), svg_num(flag_w), svg_num(flag_h / 3)
  )

  be_flag <- sprintf(
    '<rect class="flag-black" x="0" y="0" width="%s" height="%s"></rect>
     <rect class="flag-yellow" x="%s" y="0" width="%s" height="%s"></rect>
     <rect class="flag-red" x="%s" y="0" width="%s" height="%s"></rect>',
    svg_num(flag_w / 3), svg_num(flag_h),
    svg_num(flag_w / 3), svg_num(flag_w / 3), svg_num(flag_h),
    svg_num(flag_w * 2 / 3), svg_num(flag_w / 3), svg_num(flag_h)
  )

  swiss_size <- flag_h
  ch_flag <- sprintf(
    '<rect class="flag-swiss-red" x="0" y="0" width="%s" height="%s"></rect>
     <rect class="flag-white" x="%s" y="%s" width="%s" height="%s"></rect>
     <rect class="flag-white" x="%s" y="%s" width="%s" height="%s"></rect>',
    svg_num(swiss_size), svg_num(swiss_size),
    svg_num(swiss_size * 0.24), svg_num(swiss_size * 0.40), svg_num(swiss_size * 0.52), svg_num(swiss_size * 0.20),
    svg_num(swiss_size * 0.40), svg_num(swiss_size * 0.20), svg_num(swiss_size * 0.20), svg_num(swiss_size * 0.60)
  )

  flanders_flag <- local_flag("www/flags/flag_flanders.svg")
  wallonia_flag <- local_flag("www/flags/flag_wallonia.svg")

  if (area_id == "netherlands") {
    content <- flag_group(-flag_w / 2, nl_flag, "Netherlands flag")
  } else if (area_id == "switzerland") {
    content <- flag_group(-swiss_size / 2, ch_flag, "Switzerland flag", swiss_size, swiss_size)
  } else if (area_id == "flanders") {
    total_w <- flag_w * 2 + gap
    content <- paste0(
      flag_group(-total_w / 2, be_flag, "Belgium flag"),
      flag_group(-total_w / 2 + flag_w + gap, flanders_flag, "Flanders flag")
    )
  } else if (area_id == "wallonia") {
    total_w <- flag_w * 2 + gap
    content <- paste0(
      flag_group(-total_w / 2, be_flag, "Belgium flag"),
      flag_group(-total_w / 2 + flag_w + gap, wallonia_flag, "Wallonia flag")
    )
  } else {
    content <- ""
  }

  sprintf(
    '<g class="map-flag-label" transform="translate(%s %s)">%s</g>',
    svg_num(x),
    svg_num(y),
    content
  )
}

make_static_map_svg <- function() {
  europe_path <- "www/geodata/europe_outline.geojson"
  region_path <- "www/geodata/target_regions.geojson"
  border_path <- "www/geodata/belgium_language_border.geojson"

  if (!file.exists(europe_path) || !file.exists(region_path) || !file.exists(border_path)) {
    return('<div class="map-error">Map boundary files are missing. Run scripts/prepare_geodata.R.</div>')
  }

  europe <- st_read(europe_path, quiet = TRUE) |> st_transform(3035)
  regions <- st_read(region_path, quiet = TRUE) |> st_transform(3035)
  belgium_border <- st_read(border_path, quiet = TRUE) |> st_transform(3035)

  target_bbox <- st_bbox(regions)
  pad_x <- as.numeric(target_bbox["xmax"] - target_bbox["xmin"]) * 1.55
  pad_y <- as.numeric(target_bbox["ymax"] - target_bbox["ymin"]) * 0.85
  xmin <- as.numeric(target_bbox["xmin"] - pad_x)
  xmax <- as.numeric(target_bbox["xmax"] + pad_x)
  ymin <- as.numeric(target_bbox["ymin"] - pad_y)
  ymax <- as.numeric(target_bbox["ymax"] + pad_y)
  view_box <- paste(svg_num(c(xmin, -ymax, xmax - xmin, ymax - ymin)), collapse = " ")

  europe_d <- polygon_path(st_geometry(europe)[[1]])
  region_paths <- paste(vapply(seq_len(nrow(regions)), function(i) {
    sprintf(
      '<path class="map-area" data-area="%s" aria-label="%s" d="%s"></path>',
      htmlEscape(regions$area_id[[i]]),
      htmlEscape(regions$area_label[[i]]),
      polygon_path(st_geometry(regions)[[i]])
    )
  }, character(1)), collapse = "\n")

  label_points <- suppressWarnings(st_point_on_surface(regions))
  label_coords <- st_coordinates(label_points)
  labels <- paste(vapply(seq_len(nrow(regions)), function(i) {
    map_flag_svg(
      regions$area_id[[i]],
      label_coords[i, "X"],
      -label_coords[i, "Y"]
    )
  }, character(1)), collapse = "\n")

  sprintf(
    '<svg id="static-europe-map" viewBox="%s" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" role="img" aria-label="Selectable map of the Netherlands, Belgium regions and Switzerland">
      <path class="europe-outline" d="%s"></path>
      %s
      <path class="belgium-border" d="%s"></path>
      %s
    </svg>',
    view_box,
    europe_d,
    region_paths,
    line_path(st_geometry(belgium_border)[[1]]),
    labels
  )
}

map_svg <- make_static_map_svg()
```

```{=html}
<style>
  :root {
    --low: #f97316;
    --medium: #facc15;
    --high: #22c55e;
    --ink: #172033;
    --muted: #657084;
    --line: #d8dee8;
    --panel: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.94);
  }

  html,
  body {
    margin: 0;
    width: 100%;
    background: #f6f8fb;
    color: var(--ink);
  }

  body {
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

  #quarto-content,
  .quarto-container,
  main.content,
  #quarto-document-content,
  .page-columns,
  .page-rows-contents,
  .page-columns .content,
  .column-page,
  .column-body {
    display: block !important;
    width: 100% !important;
    max-width: none !important;
    margin-left: 0 !important;
    margin-right: 0 !important;
    padding-left: 0 !important;
    padding-right: 0 !important;
  }

  .quarto-title-block {
    display: none;
  }

  #dashboard {
    position: relative;
    width: 100vw;
    max-width: 100vw;
    margin-left: calc(50% - 50vw);
    margin-right: calc(50% - 50vw);
    min-height: 150vh;
    overflow: visible;
    display: grid !important;
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) !important;
    grid-template-rows: auto auto minmax(1040px, 1fr);
    background: #f6f8fb;
  }

  #info-nav {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
    gap: 8px;
    padding: 8px 8px 0;
    background: #fff;
  }

  .info-button {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 8px;
    min-height: 34px;
    padding: 0 8px;
    border: 1px solid #cbd5e1;
    border-radius: 7px;
    background: #fff;
    color: var(--ink);
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 750;
    line-height: 1.15;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: transform 140ms ease, box-shadow 140ms ease, border-color 140ms ease;
  }

  .author-logo {
    display: inline-block;
    height: 1.15em;
    width: auto;
    max-width: 118px;
    object-fit: contain;
    flex: 0 1 auto;
  }

  .info-button:hover {
    transform: translateY(-1px);
    box-shadow: 0 5px 14px rgba(28, 40, 65, 0.14);
  }

  .info-modal {
    display: none;
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    z-index: 4000;
    padding: min(7vh, 56px) 18px;
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }

  .info-modal.open {
    display: block;
  }

  .info-modal-backdrop {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.42);
    backdrop-filter: blur(2px);
  }

  .info-modal-panel {
    position: relative;
    width: min(760px, 100%);
    max-height: min(78vh, 720px);
    margin: 0 auto;
    overflow-y: auto;
    border: 1px solid #dbe3ef;
    border-radius: 10px;
    background: #fff;
    color: #172033;
    box-shadow: 0 22px 60px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.24);
  }

  .info-modal-head {
    position: sticky;
    top: 0;
    z-index: 1;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 16px;
    padding: 18px 22px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
    background: #fff;
  }

  .info-modal-head h2 {
    margin: 0;
    color: #172033;
    font-size: 20px;
    line-height: 1.2;
  }

  .info-modal-close {
    display: inline-grid;
    place-items: center;
    width: 34px;
    height: 34px;
    flex: 0 0 auto;
    border: 1px solid #cbd5e1;
    border-radius: 7px;
    background: #fff;
    color: #172033;
    font-size: 22px;
    line-height: 1;
    cursor: pointer;
  }

  .info-modal-close:hover {
    border-color: #94a3b8;
    background: #f8fafc;
  }

  .info-modal-body {
    padding: 22px;
    font-size: 15px;
    line-height: 1.55;
  }

  .info-modal-body p {
    margin: 0 0 14px;
  }

  .info-modal-body .window-section {
    padding-top: 18px;
    margin-top: 18px;
    border-top: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  }

  .info-modal-body .window-section:first-of-type {
    padding-top: 0;
    margin-top: 0;
    border-top: 0;
  }

  .info-modal-body .window-section h2 {
    margin: 0 0 8px;
    color: #334155;
    font-size: 14px;
    line-height: 1.25;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  }

  .info-modal-body .link-section p {
    margin-bottom: 0;
  }

  .info-modal-body .reference-list {
    display: grid;
    gap: 16px;
    margin: 0;
    padding-left: 24px;
  }

  .info-modal-body .reference-list li {
    padding-left: 4px;
  }

  .info-modal-body .reference-title,
  .info-modal-body .reference-meta {
    display: block;
  }

  .info-modal-body .reference-title {
    margin-bottom: 3px;
    font-weight: 800;
  }

  .info-modal-body .reference-meta {
    margin-bottom: 5px;
    color: #475569;
  }

  .info-modal-body a {
    color: #1d4ed8;
    overflow-wrap: anywhere;
    font-weight: 700;
  }

  #top-panel {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1800;
    display: grid !important;
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr) !important;
    gap: 12px;
    width: 100%;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    padding: 8px;
    background: #fff;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
    overflow: visible;
  }

  .project-text,
  .legend-panel {
    border: 1px solid rgba(120, 132, 155, 0.32);
    border-radius: 8px;
    background: var(--panel);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 22px rgba(24, 35, 55, 0.08);
  }

  .project-text {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: stretch;
    justify-content: flex-start;
    gap: 6px;
    padding: 10px 14px;
    text-align: left;
  }

  .project-text h1 {
    margin: 0 0 6px;
    font-size: 20px;
    line-height: 1.2;
  }

  .project-text p {
    margin: 0;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: none;
    color: #2a3548;
    font-size: 15px;
    line-height: 1.34;
  }

  .project-text p + p {
    padding-top: 5px;
    border-top: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  }

  #map-wrap {
    --detail-panel-width: clamp(300px, 24vw, 430px);
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    display: grid !important;
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) var(--detail-panel-width) !important;
    gap: 10px;
    align-items: stretch;
    min-height: 1040px;
    overflow: visible;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    padding: 10px 8px 18px;
    background: #e7eef3;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
    transition: grid-template-columns 180ms ease;
  }

  #map-wrap.compare-count-3 {
    --detail-panel-width: clamp(440px, 36vw, 600px);
  }

  #map-wrap.compare-count-4 {
    --detail-panel-width: clamp(460px, 40vw, 660px);
  }

  #map-wrap.compare-count-5 {
    --detail-panel-width: clamp(480px, 42vw, 700px);
  }

  #map-stage {
    position: relative;
    grid-column: 1 !important;
    grid-row: 1 !important;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    min-height: 1040px;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: #edf4f7;
    border: 1px solid rgba(120, 132, 155, 0.32);
    border-radius: 8px;
  }

  #party-map {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    display: grid;
    place-items: center;
  }

  #static-europe-map {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    display: block;
  }

  .europe-outline {
    fill: #e9eef3;
    fill-opacity: 0.28;
    stroke: #8b98aa;
    stroke-width: 0.75;
    vector-effect: non-scaling-stroke;
  }

  .map-area {
    fill: #ffffff;
    fill-opacity: 0.58;
    stroke: #020617;
    stroke-width: 1.15;
    vector-effect: non-scaling-stroke;
    cursor: pointer;
    pointer-events: all;
    transition: fill 140ms ease, fill-opacity 140ms ease, stroke 140ms ease, stroke-width 140ms ease;
  }

  .map-area:hover {
    fill: #bae6fd;
    fill-opacity: 0.72;
    stroke-width: 1.75;
  }

  .map-area.selected {
    fill: #38bdf8;
    fill-opacity: 0.82;
    stroke: #0f4c81;
    stroke-width: 2.35;
  }

  .belgium-border {
    fill: none;
    stroke: #111827;
    stroke-width: 1;
    stroke-dasharray: 5 5;
    vector-effect: non-scaling-stroke;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  .map-flag-label,
  .map-flag {
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  .map-flag-frame {
    fill: #fff;
    stroke: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.42);
    stroke-width: 4500;
    paint-order: stroke;
  }

  .flag-red {
    fill: #ef3340;
  }

  .flag-swiss-red {
    fill: #d52b1e;
  }

  .flag-white {
    fill: #fff;
  }

  .flag-blue {
    fill: #21468b;
  }

  .flag-yellow {
    fill: #ffd90c;
  }

  .flag-black {
    fill: #050505;
  }

  #area-popups {
    position: absolute;
    z-index: 520;
    top: 12px;
    left: clamp(8px, 1.2vw, 18px);
    right: clamp(8px, 1.2vw, 18px);
    height: calc(100% - 24px);
    max-height: calc(100% - 24px);
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: flex-start;
    gap: 10px;
    overflow: auto;
    padding: 0 10px 10px 0;
    pointer-events: auto;
    overscroll-behavior: contain;
    scrollbar-gutter: stable both-edges;
    -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
  }

  #area-popups:empty {
    display: none;
  }

  .popup-row {
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    gap: 10px;
    width: max-content;
    max-width: none;
  }

  .legend-panel {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1900;
    padding: 10px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(148px, 176px);
    gap: 24px;
    align-items: stretch;
    overflow: visible;
  }

  .score-controls,
  .area-controls {
    position: relative;
    min-width: 0;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    overflow: visible;
  }

  .control-title {
    margin: 0 0 8px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--ink);
  }

  .control-title.has-popover {
    position: relative;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    width: fit-content;
    cursor: help;
  }

  .control-title.has-popover::after {
    content: "?";
    display: inline-grid;
    place-items: center;
    width: 15px;
    height: 15px;
    margin-left: 5px;
    border: 1px solid #cbd5e1;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: #fff;
    color: #64748b;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 850;
  }

  .dimension-stack {
    display: grid;
    gap: 8px;
  }

  .dimension-row {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: minmax(82px, 0.42fr) minmax(0, 1fr);
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
  }

  .dimension-row-label {
    position: relative;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    width: fit-content;
    cursor: help;
    color: var(--muted);
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 750;
    line-height: 1.25;
  }

  .dimension-row-label::after {
    content: "?";
    display: inline-grid;
    place-items: center;
    width: 15px;
    height: 15px;
    margin-left: 5px;
    border: 1px solid #cbd5e1;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: #fff;
    color: #64748b;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 850;
  }

  .dimension-popover {
    position: absolute;
    z-index: 3600;
    top: calc(100% + 7px);
    left: 0;
    width: min(390px, 78vw);
    max-height: min(70vh, 560px);
    overflow-y: auto;
    padding: 12px;
    border: 1px solid #cbd5e1;
    border-radius: 8px;
    background: #fff;
    color: #2a3548;
    box-shadow: 0 14px 32px rgba(24, 35, 55, 0.16);
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.42;
    opacity: 0;
    transform: translateY(-4px);
    pointer-events: none;
    transition: opacity 140ms ease, transform 140ms ease;
  }

  .dimension-popover strong {
    color: #172033;
    font-weight: 850;
  }

  .popover-intro,
  .score-definition,
  .criterion {
    display: block;
  }

  .popover-intro {
    margin-bottom: 9px;
  }

  .popover-section {
    display: block;
    padding-top: 9px;
    margin-top: 9px;
    border-top: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  }

  .popover-section:first-child {
    padding-top: 0;
    margin-top: 0;
    border-top: 0;
  }

  .popover-heading {
    display: block;
    margin-bottom: 5px;
    color: #172033;
    font-weight: 850;
  }

  .criteria-list {
    display: grid;
    gap: 4px;
    counter-reset: criterion;
  }

  .criterion {
    position: relative;
    padding-left: 23px;
  }

  .criterion::before {
    content: counter(criterion) ".";
    counter-increment: criterion;
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    top: 0;
    min-width: 17px;
    color: #64748b;
    font-weight: 850;
  }

  .score-definition + .score-definition {
    margin-top: 4px;
  }

  .score-badge {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    min-width: 48px;
    padding: 2px 7px;
    margin-right: 4px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 850;
    line-height: 1.2;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .score-badge.low {
    background: rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.18);
    color: #9a3412;
    border: 1px solid rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.42);
  }

  .score-badge.medium {
    background: rgba(250, 204, 21, 0.30);
    color: #854d0e;
    border: 1px solid rgba(212, 169, 0, 0.42);
  }

  .score-badge.high {
    background: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.20);
    color: #166534;
    border: 1px solid rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.42);
  }

  .dimension-popover::before {
    content: "";
    position: absolute;
    top: -6px;
    left: 14px;
    width: 10px;
    height: 10px;
    border-left: 1px solid #cbd5e1;
    border-top: 1px solid #cbd5e1;
    background: #fff;
    transform: rotate(45deg);
  }

  .dimension-row-label:hover .dimension-popover,
  .dimension-row-label:focus .dimension-popover,
  .dimension-row-label:focus-visible .dimension-popover,
  .control-title.has-popover:hover .dimension-popover,
  .control-title.has-popover:focus .dimension-popover,
  .control-title.has-popover:focus-visible .dimension-popover {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: translateY(0);
    pointer-events: auto;
  }

  .dimension-row-buttons {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
    gap: 6px;
  }

  .dimension-row-buttons.single {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .score-level-row {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: minmax(82px, 0.42fr) minmax(0, 1fr);
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    margin-top: auto;
    padding-top: 8px;
  }

  .filter-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
    gap: 6px;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 100%;
  }

  .level-title {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
  }

  .area-title {
    margin-top: 0;
  }

  .area-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    gap: 6px;
  }

  .dimension-button,
  .filter-button,
  .area-button,
  .clear-button {
    border: 1px solid #cbd5e1;
    background: #fff;
    color: var(--ink);
    border-radius: 7px;
    min-height: 36px;
    padding: 0 8px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 650;
    line-height: 1.15;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: transform 140ms ease, box-shadow 140ms ease, border-color 140ms ease;
  }

  .area-button {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: flex-start;
    gap: 7px;
  }

  .filter-button {
    padding: 0 6px;
    font-size: 13px;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }

  .clear-button {
    align-self: end;
    margin-top: 6px;
    border-color: #94a3b8;
    background: #f8fafc;
  }

  .area-actions {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
    gap: 6px;
    margin-top: auto;
    padding-top: 8px;
  }

  .area-actions .clear-button {
    align-self: start;
    margin-top: 0;
    min-height: 36px;
    height: 36px;
  }

  .area-flag {
    position: relative;
    display: inline-block;
    width: 22px;
    height: 15px;
    flex: 0 0 auto;
    overflow: hidden;
    border: 1px solid rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.24);
    border-radius: 2px;
    background: #fff;
  }

  .flag-nl {
    background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #ae1c28 0 33.333%, #fff 33.333% 66.666%, #21468b 66.666%);
  }

  .flag-ch {
    width: 17px;
    height: 17px;
    background:
      linear-gradient(#fff, #fff) center / 12px 4px no-repeat,
      linear-gradient(#fff, #fff) center / 4px 12px no-repeat,
      #d52b1e;
  }

  .area-button .area-flag.flag-ch {
    width: 17px;
    height: 17px;
    aspect-ratio: 1;
  }

  .flag-be {
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, #000 0 33.333%, #ffd90c 33.333% 66.666%, #ef3340 66.666%);
  }

  .flag-pair {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 3px;
    flex: 0 0 auto;
  }

  .flag-pair .area-flag {
    width: 19px;
    height: 13px;
  }

  .flag-vl {
    background: #ffd90c url("www/flags/flag_flanders.svg") center / cover no-repeat;
  }

  .flag-vl::after {
    content: none;
  }

  .flag-wa {
    background: #ffd90c url("www/flags/flag_wallonia.svg") center / cover no-repeat;
  }

  .flag-wa::after {
    content: none;
  }

  .level-swatch {
    display: inline-block;
    width: 9px;
    height: 9px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    margin-right: 5px;
    vertical-align: 1px;
  }

  .level-swatch.low {
    background: var(--low);
  }

  .level-swatch.medium {
    background: var(--medium);
  }

  .level-swatch.high {
    background: var(--high);
  }

  .dimension-button:hover,
  .dimension-button.active,
  .filter-button:hover,
  .filter-button.active,
  .area-button:hover,
  .area-button.active,
  .clear-button:hover {
    transform: translateY(-1px);
    box-shadow: 0 5px 14px rgba(28, 40, 65, 0.16);
  }

  .dimension-button.active {
    border-color: #334155;
    background: #172033;
    color: #fff;
  }

  .filter-button[data-filter="all"].active {
    border-color: #334155;
    background: #172033;
    color: #fff;
    box-shadow: 0 5px 14px rgba(28, 40, 65, 0.16), 0 0 0 3px rgba(51, 65, 85, 0.18);
  }

  .filter-button[data-filter="low"].active {
    border-color: var(--low);
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.22);
  }

  .filter-button[data-filter="medium"].active {
    border-color: #d4a900;
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(250, 204, 21, 0.28);
  }

  .filter-button[data-filter="high"].active {
    border-color: var(--high);
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.24);
  }

  .area-button.active {
    border-color: #2563eb;
    background: #1d4ed8;
    color: #fff;
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.26);
  }

  .source-panel {
    width: 100%;
    margin-top: 6px;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--muted);
    line-height: 1.35;
    text-align: left;
  }

  .area-party-popup {
    flex: 0 0 auto;
    width: max-content;
    max-width: none;
    min-width: 0;
    padding: 10px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(120, 132, 155, 0.38);
    border-radius: 8px;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.96);
    box-shadow: 0 14px 34px rgba(24, 35, 55, 0.18);
    pointer-events: auto;
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  }

  .area-popup-head {
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 10px;
  }

  .area-party-popup h3 {
    margin: 0 0 4px;
    font-size: 15px;
  }

  .area-party-popup p {
    margin: 0 0 6px;
    color: var(--muted);
    font-size: 12px;
  }

  .area-close {
    width: 26px;
    height: 26px;
    border: 1px solid #cbd5e1;
    border-radius: 6px;
    background: #fff;
    color: var(--ink);
    font-size: 18px;
    line-height: 1;
    cursor: pointer;
  }

  .party-logo-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(var(--party-columns, 3), 86px);
    grid-template-rows: repeat(2, auto);
    grid-auto-flow: column;
    align-items: stretch;
    gap: 7px;
    max-height: none;
    max-width: none;
    overflow: visible;
    padding: 2px;
  }

  .party-logo-card {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-rows: 62px minmax(26px, auto) 12px;
    justify-items: center;
    align-content: start;
    gap: 4px;
    min-width: 0;
    width: 86px;
    min-height: 114px;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    padding: 5px 3px;
    border-radius: 7px;
    border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
    background: #fff;
    color: inherit;
    cursor: pointer;
    font: inherit;
    transition: opacity 140ms ease, transform 140ms ease, border-color 140ms ease, box-shadow 140ms ease;
  }

  .party-logo-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-1px);
  }

  .party-logo-card.selected-party {
    border-color: #0284c7;
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.28), 0 10px 22px rgba(14, 55, 90, 0.18);
    transform: translateY(-1px);
  }

  .party-logo-card.selected-party .party-logo {
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.28), 0 8px 18px rgba(20, 33, 55, 0.28);
  }

  .party-logo-card.match-low {
    border-color: var(--low);
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.20);
  }

  .party-logo-card.match-medium {
    border-color: #d4a900;
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(250, 204, 21, 0.26);
  }

  .party-logo-card.match-high {
    border-color: var(--high);
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.20);
  }

  .party-logo-card.dimmed {
    opacity: 0.38;
  }

  .party-logo {
    width: 62px;
    height: 62px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    border: 2px solid #fff;
    background: #fff;
    box-shadow: 0 5px 14px rgba(20, 33, 55, 0.24);
    display: grid;
    place-items: center;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .party-logo img {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    padding: 0;
    background: #fff;
  }

  .party-logo .fallback-logo {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    display: grid;
    place-items: center;
    background: #172033;
    color: #fff;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: 0;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 4px;
  }

  .party-logo-name {
    max-width: 100%;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 700;
    line-height: 1.15;
    color: var(--ink);
    text-align: center;
    overflow-wrap: anywhere;
    hyphens: auto;
  }

  .party-logo-score {
    color: var(--muted);
    font-size: 10px;
  }

  .map-side-panel {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 530;
    width: auto;
    display: grid;
    align-content: start;
    gap: 10px;
    min-width: 0;
    padding: 14px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(120, 132, 155, 0.32);
    border-radius: 8px;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.94);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 22px rgba(24, 35, 55, 0.08);
    pointer-events: auto;
  }

  #selection-data-panel {
    --data-panel-height: 720px;
    position: sticky;
    top: 10px;
    grid-column: 2 !important;
    grid-row: 1 !important;
    align-self: start;
    height: var(--data-panel-height);
    max-height: var(--data-panel-height);
    overflow-y: auto;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    overscroll-behavior: contain;
    overscroll-behavior-y: contain;
    scrollbar-gutter: stable;
    touch-action: pan-y;
    -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
  }

  .detail-title {
    margin: 0;
    font-size: 20px;
    line-height: 1.25;
  }

  .detail-title-row {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 10px;
    min-width: 0;
  }

  .detail-title-label {
    min-width: 0;
    overflow-wrap: anywhere;
  }

  .detail-clear-button {
    flex: 0 0 auto;
    min-height: 28px;
    padding: 0 9px;
    border: 1px solid #cbd5e1;
    border-radius: 7px;
    background: #f8fafc;
    color: var(--ink);
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 800;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: transform 140ms ease, box-shadow 140ms ease, border-color 140ms ease;
  }

  .detail-clear-button:hover {
    transform: translateY(-1px);
    border-color: #94a3b8;
    box-shadow: 0 5px 14px rgba(28, 40, 65, 0.14);
  }

  .detail-title-content {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    min-width: 0;
  }

  .detail-title-logo {
    width: 28px;
    height: 28px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
    background: #fff;
    object-fit: cover;
    flex: 0 0 auto;
  }

  .detail-title-flag {
    width: 22px;
    height: 15px;
    flex: 0 0 auto;
  }

  .detail-title-name {
    min-width: 0;
    overflow-wrap: anywhere;
  }

  .detail-meta {
    margin-top: 8px;
    color: var(--muted);
    font-size: 14px;
  }

  .detail-body {
    margin: 0;
    color: #2a3548;
    font-size: 15px;
    line-height: 1.55;
  }

  .score-profile {
    display: grid;
    gap: 10px;
  }

  .score-row {
    display: grid;
    gap: 6px;
    padding: 10px;
    border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
    border-radius: 8px;
    background: #fff;
  }

  .score-row-top {
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 8px;
  }

  .score-label {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 800;
    line-height: 1.25;
    color: var(--ink);
  }

  .score-pill {
    flex: 0 0 auto;
    min-width: 54px;
    padding: 3px 7px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    color: #111827;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 800;
    text-align: center;
    text-transform: capitalize;
  }

  .score-pill.low {
    background: rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.20);
    color: #9a3412;
  }

  .score-pill.medium {
    background: rgba(250, 204, 21, 0.32);
    color: #854d0e;
  }

  .score-pill.high {
    background: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.22);
    color: #166534;
  }

  .score-pill.unknown {
    background: #e2e8f0;
    color: #475569;
  }

  .score-meter {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 4px;
  }

  .score-segment {
    height: 8px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    background: #e2e8f0;
  }

  .score-segment.low.active {
    background: var(--low);
  }

  .score-segment.medium.active {
    background: var(--medium);
  }

  .score-segment.high.active {
    background: var(--high);
  }

  .radar-card {
    padding: 10px;
    border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
    border-radius: 8px;
    background: #fff;
  }

  .radar-title {
    margin: 0 0 8px;
    color: var(--ink);
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 800;
    line-height: 1.25;
  }

  .radar-chart {
    width: 100%;
    height: auto;
    display: block;
  }

  .radar-grid {
    fill: none;
    stroke: #cbd5e1;
    stroke-width: 1;
  }

  .radar-axis {
    stroke: #e2e8f0;
    stroke-width: 1;
  }

  .radar-area {
    fill: rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.22);
    stroke: #0284c7;
    stroke-width: 2;
  }

  .radar-point {
    fill: #0284c7;
    stroke: #fff;
    stroke-width: 1.5;
  }

  .comparison-radar-area {
    fill-opacity: 0.10;
    stroke-width: 2.4;
    stroke-linejoin: round;
  }

  .comparison-radar-point {
    stroke: #fff;
    stroke-width: 1.6;
  }

  .radar-label {
    fill: #475569;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 750;
    text-anchor: middle;
  }

  .party-note {
    margin-top: 2px;
    color: var(--muted);
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.4;
  }

  .comparison-profile {
    --comparison-count: 2;
    display: grid;
    gap: 10px;
  }

  .selection-help,
  .comparison-mode-note {
    margin: 0;
    color: var(--muted);
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
    line-height: 1.35;
  }

  .comparison-mode-note {
    padding: 8px 9px;
    border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
    border-radius: 8px;
    background: #f8fafc;
  }

  .comparison-radar-card {
    display: grid;
    gap: 8px;
  }

  .comparison-radar-card .radar-chart {
    width: min(100%, 360px);
    justify-self: center;
  }

  .comparison-radar-legend {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 6px;
  }

  .comparison-radar-key {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    min-width: 0;
    max-width: 100%;
    gap: 5px;
    padding: 3px 6px;
    border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
    border-radius: 999px;
    background: #f8fafc;
    color: var(--ink);
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 800;
    line-height: 1.2;
  }

  .comparison-radar-swatch {
    width: 9px;
    height: 9px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    flex: 0 0 auto;
  }

  .comparison-radar-name {
    min-width: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }

  .comparison-parties {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(var(--comparison-count), minmax(78px, 1fr));
    gap: 8px;
  }

  .comparison-party {
    display: grid;
    gap: 6px;
    justify-items: center;
    padding: 9px 6px;
    border: 1px solid #0284c7;
    border-radius: 8px;
    background: #f0f9ff;
    color: inherit;
    cursor: pointer;
    font: inherit;
    text-align: center;
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.18);
    transition: transform 140ms ease, box-shadow 140ms ease, border-color 140ms ease;
  }

  .comparison-party:hover {
    transform: translateY(-1px);
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.26), 0 8px 18px rgba(20, 33, 55, 0.14);
  }

  .comparison-party:focus-visible {
    outline: 3px solid rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.28);
    outline-offset: 2px;
  }

  .comparison-logo {
    width: 42px;
    height: 42px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
    background: #fff;
    object-fit: cover;
  }

  .comparison-name {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 800;
    line-height: 1.2;
    overflow-wrap: anywhere;
  }

  .comparison-area {
    color: var(--muted);
    font-size: 12px;
    line-height: 1.2;
  }

  .comparison-table {
    display: grid;
    gap: 7px;
  }

  .comparison-row {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: minmax(110px, 1.1fr) repeat(var(--comparison-count), minmax(58px, 0.8fr));
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
    padding: 8px;
    border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
    border-radius: 8px;
    background: #fff;
  }

  .comparison-dimension {
    color: var(--ink);
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 800;
    line-height: 1.25;
  }

  .selection-summary {
    display: grid;
    gap: 9px;
  }

  .selection-kicker {
    color: var(--muted);
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 700;
    line-height: 1.35;
  }

  .selection-party-list {
    display: grid;
    gap: 7px;
  }

  .selection-party-row {
    display: grid;
    gap: 4px;
    padding: 8px;
    border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
    border-radius: 8px;
    background: #fff;
  }

  .selection-party-top {
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 8px;
  }

  .selection-party-name {
    color: var(--ink);
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 800;
    line-height: 1.25;
  }

  .selection-party-area {
    color: var(--muted);
    font-size: 12px;
    line-height: 1.25;
  }

  .aggregate-section {
    display: grid;
    gap: 12px;
  }

  .aggregate-card {
    display: grid;
    gap: 10px;
    padding: 10px;
    border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
    border-radius: 8px;
    background: #fff;
  }

  .aggregate-card-title {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 8px;
    color: var(--ink);
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 850;
    line-height: 1.2;
  }

  .aggregate-total {
    color: var(--muted);
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 750;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }

  .aggregate-bars {
    display: grid;
    gap: 9px;
  }

  .aggregate-row {
    display: grid;
    gap: 5px;
  }

  .aggregate-row-head {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 8px;
  }

  .aggregate-dimension {
    color: var(--ink);
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 800;
    line-height: 1.2;
  }

  .aggregate-counts {
    color: var(--muted);
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 750;
    line-height: 1.2;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }

  .aggregate-stack {
    display: flex;
    width: 100%;
    height: 14px;
    overflow: hidden;
    border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
    border-radius: 999px;
    background: #f8fafc;
  }

  .aggregate-segment {
    height: 100%;
    min-width: 0;
    opacity: 1;
    transition: opacity 140ms ease, filter 140ms ease;
  }

  .aggregate-stack.filtered .aggregate-segment {
    opacity: 0.22;
  }

  .aggregate-stack.filtered .aggregate-segment.active {
    opacity: 1;
    filter: saturate(1.18);
  }

  .aggregate-segment.low {
    background: #f97316;
  }

  .aggregate-segment.medium {
    background: #facc15;
  }

  .aggregate-segment.high {
    background: #22c55e;
  }

  @media (max-width: 1120px) {
    #top-panel {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
    }

    .legend-panel {
      grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(148px, 176px);
    }

    #map-wrap.compare-count-3,
    #map-wrap.compare-count-4,
    #map-wrap.compare-count-5 {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
    }

    #map-wrap.compare-count-3 #selection-data-panel,
    #map-wrap.compare-count-4 #selection-data-panel,
    #map-wrap.compare-count-5 #selection-data-panel {
      position: relative;
      top: auto;
      grid-column: 1 !important;
      grid-row: 2 !important;
      height: min(720px, 70vh);
      max-height: min(720px, 70vh);
      overflow-y: auto;
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 760px) {
    #dashboard {
      height: auto;
      min-height: 100vh;
      overflow: visible;
      grid-template-rows: auto minmax(540px, 68vh);
    }

    #top-panel {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }

    #map-wrap {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
      min-height: 540px;
    }

    .comparison-parties {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
    }

    #map-stage {
      min-height: 620px;
    }

    .dimension-row {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }

    .score-level-row {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      gap: 6px;
    }

    .filter-grid {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
    }

    #area-popups {
      left: 12px;
      right: 12px;
      justify-content: flex-start;
    }

    .party-logo-grid {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(var(--party-columns, 3), 86px);
    }

    .party-logo-card {
      width: 86px;
    }

    .map-side-panel {
      position: static;
      width: auto;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      gap: 10px;
      margin-bottom: 10px;
    }

    #selection-data-panel {
      height: auto;
      max-height: none;
      overflow-y: visible;
      overscroll-behavior: auto;
    }
  }
</style>

<div id="dashboard">
  <nav id="info-nav" aria-label="Project information links">
    <button class="info-button" type="button" data-info-window="author"><img class="author-logo" src="www/rug_logoen_rood_rgb.png" alt="University of Groningen logo"><span>Adrian Favero</span></button>
    <button class="info-button" type="button" data-info-window="output">Related output</button>
    <button class="info-button" type="button" data-info-window="dataset">Dataset</button>
    <button class="info-button" type="button" data-info-window="acknowledgements">Acknowledgements</button>
  </nav>
  <div id="info-modal" class="info-modal" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="info-modal-backdrop" data-info-close></div>
    <section class="info-modal-panel" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="info-modal-title">
      <div class="info-modal-head">
        <h2 id="info-modal-title">Information</h2>
        <button class="info-modal-close" type="button" aria-label="Close information panel" data-info-close>&times;</button>
      </div>
      <div class="info-modal-body" id="info-modal-body"></div>
    </section>
  </div>
  <section id="top-panel" aria-label="Project explanation and score controls">
    <div class="project-text">
      <h1>Transnational Party Organisation</h1>
      <p>The TPO database maps how political parties organise and maintain connections beyond their national borders. It measures different forms of transnational party organisation, including physical infrastructure such as international branches, offices, and networks, organisational structures and rules, and digital outreach through social media platforms.</p>
      <p>The database works with different levels and indicators for each level. For example, it examines whether parties have official branches abroad, how formalised these organisations are, whether members abroad have rights within the party, and how parties communicate with citizens living overseas.</p>
      <p>It also looks at the activities of these networks, as well as their online presence on social media platforms. Overall, the database helps researchers and the broader public better understand how political parties operate across borders and engage with non-resident citizens.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="legend-panel">
      <div class="score-controls">
        <p class="control-title has-popover" tabindex="0">Score Dimension
          <span class="dimension-popover" role="tooltip">
            <span class="popover-intro">The dashboard distinguishes between the main dimensions used to classify transnational party organisation.</span>
            <span class="popover-section">
              <span class="popover-heading">Dashboard dimensions</span>
              <span class="criteria-list">
                <span class="criterion"><strong>Infrastructure</strong>: physical transnational party infrastructure.</span>
                <span class="criterion"><strong>Formalisation</strong> and <strong>Incorporation</strong>: organisational variation in transnational party infrastructure.</span>
                <span class="criterion"><strong>Social media</strong>: digital transnational party infrastructure.</span>
              </span>
            </span>
            <span class="popover-section">
              <span class="popover-heading">Neutral view</span>
              <span><strong>All dimensions</strong> shows the four measures together and supports cross-case comparison.</span>
            </span>
          </span>
        </p>
        <div class="dimension-stack" role="group" aria-label="Select transnationalisation dimension">
          <div class="dimension-row">
            <div class="dimension-row-label" tabindex="0">Neutral view
              <span class="dimension-popover" role="tooltip">
                <span class="popover-heading">All dimensions</span>
                <span class="popover-intro">Shows all four score dimensions together.</span>
                <span class="popover-section">
                  <span class="popover-heading">Filtering logic</span>
                  <span>When a <strong>Score Level</strong> is selected, parties match if they have that level in at least one dimension.</span>
                </span>
              </span>
            </div>
            <div class="dimension-row-buttons single">
              <button class="dimension-button active" type="button" data-dimension="all">All dimensions</button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="dimension-row">
            <div class="dimension-row-label" tabindex="0">Physical infrastructure
              <span class="dimension-popover" role="tooltip">
                <span class="popover-heading">Infrastructure</span>
                <span class="popover-intro">Physical transnational party infrastructure is ranked with five criteria.</span>
                <span class="criteria-list">
                  <span class="criterion">Website dedicated to international or external-citizen activity.</span>
                  <span class="criterion">Own international office.</span>
                  <span class="criterion">Number of branches or contacts abroad.</span>
                  <span class="criterion">Size, measured through members abroad where available.</span>
                  <span class="criterion">Affiliated institute.</span>
                </span>
              </span>
            </div>
            <div class="dimension-row-buttons single">
              <button class="dimension-button" type="button" data-dimension="physical_level">Infrastructure</button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="dimension-row">
            <div class="dimension-row-label" tabindex="0">Organisational variation
              <span class="dimension-popover" role="tooltip">
                <span class="popover-intro">Organisational variation captures how transnational party infrastructure is structured and linked to the national party.</span>
                <span class="popover-section">
                  <span class="popover-heading">Formalisation</span>
                  <span class="criteria-list">
                    <span class="criterion">Statutory recognition.</span>
                    <span class="criterion">Registration of branches.</span>
                    <span class="criterion">Membership status of members abroad.</span>
                    <span class="criterion">Branches with their own rules and procedures.</span>
                    <span class="criterion">Type and regularity of activities.</span>
                  </span>
                </span>
                <span class="popover-section">
                  <span class="popover-heading">Incorporation</span>
                  <span class="criteria-list">
                    <span class="criterion">Organisation initiated at home or abroad.</span>
                    <span class="criterion">Organisation controlled by the home party.</span>
                    <span class="criterion">Ideological linkage.</span>
                    <span class="criterion">Formal rights within the national party.</span>
                    <span class="criterion">Influence over domestic party policy.</span>
                    <span class="criterion">Delegation in the national party organisation.</span>
                    <span class="criterion">Financial support from the national party.</span>
                  </span>
                </span>
              </span>
            </div>
            <div class="dimension-row-buttons">
              <button class="dimension-button" type="button" data-dimension="formalisation_level">Formalisation</button>
              <button class="dimension-button" type="button" data-dimension="incorporation_level">Incorporation</button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="dimension-row">
            <div class="dimension-row-label" tabindex="0">Digital infrastructure
              <span class="dimension-popover" role="tooltip">
                <span class="popover-heading">Social media</span>
                <span class="popover-intro">Digital transnational party infrastructure captures dedicated expat or external-citizen channels on major social media platforms.</span>
                <span class="criteria-list">
                  <span class="criterion">Presence on Facebook, Instagram, Twitter/X, or TikTok.</span>
                  <span class="criterion">Audience size, measured through follower counts where available.</span>
                  <span class="criterion">Recency of activity, measured through the last entry.</span>
                </span>
              </span>
            </div>
            <div class="dimension-row-buttons single">
              <button class="dimension-button" type="button" data-dimension="digital_level">Social media</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="score-level-row">
          <p class="control-title level-title has-popover" tabindex="0">Score Level
            <span class="dimension-popover" role="tooltip">
              <span class="popover-section">
                <span class="popover-heading">Infrastructure</span>
                <span class="score-definition"><span class="score-badge high">High</span> international website or office and branches or contacts abroad.</span>
                <span class="score-definition"><span class="score-badge medium">Medium</span> international division, party branches, or external contacts.</span>
                <span class="score-definition"><span class="score-badge low">Low</span> no organisational infrastructure.</span>
              </span>
              <span class="popover-section">
                <span class="popover-heading">Formalisation</span>
                <span class="score-definition"><span class="score-badge high">High</span> statutory recognition, formally registered branches, official members, institutionalised rules, and regular activities for citizens abroad.</span>
                <span class="score-definition"><span class="score-badge low">Low</span> one or more of these conditions is not met.</span>
              </span>
              <span class="popover-section">
                <span class="popover-heading">Incorporation</span>
                <span class="score-definition"><span class="score-badge high">High</span> initiated and controlled by the home party, ideologically linked, formal rights for external members, national-party representation, and influence over policy.</span>
                <span class="score-definition"><span class="score-badge low">Low</span> one or more of these conditions is not met.</span>
              </span>
              <span class="popover-section">
                <span class="popover-heading">Social media</span>
                <span class="score-definition"><span class="score-badge high">High</span> more than two dedicated expat channels.</span>
                <span class="score-definition"><span class="score-badge medium">Medium</span> one or two dedicated expat channels.</span>
                <span class="score-definition"><span class="score-badge low">Low</span> no dedicated expat social-media channel.</span>
              </span>
            </span>
          </p>
          <div class="filter-grid" role="group" aria-label="Filter parties by score level">
            <button class="filter-button active" type="button" data-filter="all">All</button>
            <button class="filter-button" type="button" data-filter="low"><span class="level-swatch low"></span>Low</button>
            <button class="filter-button" type="button" data-filter="medium"><span class="level-swatch medium"></span>Medium</button>
            <button class="filter-button" type="button" data-filter="high"><span class="level-swatch high"></span>High</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="area-controls">
        <p class="control-title area-title">Country / Region</p>
        <div class="area-grid" role="group" aria-label="Select country or Belgian region">
          <button class="area-button" type="button" data-area="netherlands"><span class="area-flag flag-nl"></span>Netherlands</button>
          <button class="area-button" type="button" data-area="flanders"><span class="flag-pair"><span class="area-flag flag-be"></span><span class="area-flag flag-vl"></span></span>Flanders</button>
          <button class="area-button" type="button" data-area="wallonia"><span class="flag-pair"><span class="area-flag flag-be"></span><span class="area-flag flag-wa"></span></span>Wallonia</button>
          <button class="area-button" type="button" data-area="switzerland"><span class="area-flag flag-ch"></span>Switzerland</button>
        </div>
        <div class="area-actions">
          <button class="clear-button" id="select-all-areas-button" type="button">Select all</button>
          <button class="clear-button" id="clear-selection-button" type="button">Deselect all</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>
  <div id="map-wrap" role="region" aria-label="Map of transnational party strategies">
    <div id="map-stage">
      <div id="party-map">`r map_svg`</div>
      <div id="area-popups" aria-live="polite"></div>
    </div>
    <aside id="selection-data-panel" class="map-side-panel">
      <h2 class="detail-title" id="detail-title">Selection data</h2>
      <div class="detail-meta" id="detail-meta">Interactive selection summary</div>
      <p class="detail-body" id="detail-body">This window summarises selected countries or regions with low, medium and high score aggregates per dimension. Select one party to see its four-dimension profile, or select up to five parties to compare their scores side by side.</p>
    </aside>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  ["dashboard", "map-wrap"].forEach(id => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) el.classList.remove("page-columns", "page-full");
  });

  const parties = `r party_json`;
  const sourceLabel = `r jsonlite::toJSON(as.character(source_label), auto_unbox = TRUE)`;

  const degreeColors = {
    low: "#f97316",
    medium: "#facc15",
    high: "#22c55e",
    unknown: "#94a3b8"
  };

  const sourceLabelNode = document.getElementById("source-label");
  if (sourceLabelNode) sourceLabelNode.textContent = sourceLabel;
  let activeDimension = "all";
  let activeFilter = "all";
  let selectedPartyIds = [];
  const maxComparedParties = 5;
  const selectedAreaIds = new Set();
  const areaOrder = ["netherlands", "flanders", "wallonia", "switzerland"];

  const dimensionLabels = {
    all: "All dimensions",
    physical_level: "Physical infrastructure",
    formalisation_level: "Formalisation",
    incorporation_level: "Incorporation",
    digital_level: "Digital/social media"
  };

  const areaLabels = {
    netherlands: "Netherlands",
    flanders: "Flanders",
    wallonia: "Wallonia",
    switzerland: "Switzerland"
  };

  const scoreDimensions = [
    ["physical_level", "Physical infrastructure"],
    ["formalisation_level", "Formalisation"],
    ["incorporation_level", "Incorporation"],
    ["digital_level", "Digital/social media"]
  ];

  const scoreValues = { low: 1, medium: 2, high: 3, unknown: 0 };
  const comparisonColors = ["#2563eb", "#dc2626", "#16a34a", "#7c3aed", "#ea580c"];
  const comparisonDashPatterns = ["", "7 3", "3 3", "10 3 2 3", "2 4"];

  const areaElements = new Map();
  const staticMap = document.getElementById("static-europe-map");
  if (staticMap && !staticMap.getAttribute("viewBox") && staticMap.getAttribute("viewbox")) {
    staticMap.setAttribute("viewBox", staticMap.getAttribute("viewbox"));
  }

  document.querySelectorAll(".map-area").forEach(area => {
    const areaId = area.dataset.area;
    areaElements.set(areaId, area);
    area.addEventListener("click", event => {
      event.preventDefault();
      event.stopPropagation();
      toggleArea(areaId);
    });
  });

  function cleanText(value) {
    return String(value || "").replace(/[&<>"']/g, match => ({
      "&": "&amp;",
      "<": "&lt;",
      ">": "&gt;",
      '"': "&quot;",
      "'": "&#039;"
    }[match]));
  }

  function refreshAreaStyles() {
    areaElements.forEach((area, areaId) => {
      area.classList.toggle("selected", selectedAreaIds.has(areaId));
    });
    document.querySelectorAll(".area-button").forEach(button => {
      button.classList.toggle("active", selectedAreaIds.has(button.dataset.area));
    });
  }

  function partyAreaId(party) {
    if (party.country === "Netherlands") return "netherlands";
    if (party.country === "Switzerland") return "switzerland";
    if (party.country === "Belgium" && party.region === "Flanders") return "flanders";
    if (party.country === "Belgium" && party.region === "Wallonia") return "wallonia";
    return "";
  }

  function partiesForArea(areaId) {
    return parties
      .filter(party => partyAreaId(party) === areaId)
      .sort((a, b) => String(a.party).localeCompare(String(b.party)));
  }

  function logoHtml(party) {
    if (party.logo_path) {
      return `<img src="${cleanText(party.logo_path)}" alt="${cleanText(party.party)} logo">`;
    }
    return `<span class="fallback-logo">${cleanText(party.party_abbr || party.party.slice(0, 3))}</span>`;
  }

  function areaFlagClass(areaId) {
    if (areaId === "netherlands") return "flag-nl";
    if (areaId === "switzerland") return "flag-ch";
    return "flag-be";
  }

  function syncComparisonLayout() {
    const mapWrap = document.getElementById("map-wrap");
    if (!mapWrap) return;
    const count = Math.min(selectedPartyIds.length, maxComparedParties);
    mapWrap.classList.remove("compare-count-3", "compare-count-4", "compare-count-5");
    if (count >= 3) mapWrap.classList.add(`compare-count-${count}`);
  }

  function setDetailTitle(titleHtml, showPartyClear = false) {
    const action = showPartyClear
      ? '<button class="detail-clear-button" id="detail-clear-parties" type="button">Deselect all</button>'
      : "";
    document.getElementById("detail-title").innerHTML = `
      <span class="detail-title-row">
        <span class="detail-title-label">${titleHtml}</span>
        ${action}
      </span>
    `;
    const clearButton = document.getElementById("detail-clear-parties");
    if (clearButton) clearButton.addEventListener("click", clearPartySelections);
  }

  function partyTitleHtml(party) {
    const areaId = partyAreaId(party);
    const logo = party.logo_path
      ? `<img class="detail-title-logo" src="${cleanText(party.logo_path)}" alt="${cleanText(party.party)} logo">`
      : `<span class="detail-title-logo fallback-logo">${cleanText(party.party_abbr || party.party.slice(0, 3))}</span>`;
    return `
      <span class="detail-title-content">
        ${logo}
        <span class="area-flag detail-title-flag ${areaFlagClass(areaId)}" aria-hidden="true"></span>
        <span class="detail-title-name">${cleanText(party.party)}</span>
      </span>
    `;
  }

  function partyLevels(party) {
    return scoreDimensions.map(([key]) => party[key] || "unknown");
  }

  function partyMatchesActiveFilter(party) {
    if (activeFilter === "all") return true;
    if (activeDimension === "all") return partyLevels(party).includes(activeFilter);
    return party[activeDimension] === activeFilter;
  }

  function partyActiveScoreLabel(party) {
    if (activeDimension !== "all") return party[activeDimension] || "unknown";
    if (activeFilter !== "all") {
      const matches = partyLevels(party).filter(level => level === activeFilter).length;
      return matches > 0 ? `${matches} ${activeFilter}` : "no match";
    }
    return "all dims";
  }

  function partyActiveScoreClass(party) {
    if (activeDimension !== "all") return party[activeDimension] || "unknown";
    if (activeFilter !== "all" && partyMatchesActiveFilter(party)) return activeFilter;
    return "unknown";
  }

  function logoCardHtml(party) {
    const score = partyActiveScoreLabel(party);
    const scoreClass = partyActiveScoreClass(party);
    const isMatch = partyMatchesActiveFilter(party);
    const matchClass = activeFilter !== "all" && isMatch ? ` match-${scoreClass}` : "";
    const dimClass = activeFilter !== "all" && !isMatch ? " dimmed" : "";
    const isSelected = selectedPartyIds.includes(party.id);
    const selectedClass = isSelected ? " selected-party" : "";
    return `
      <button class="party-logo-card${matchClass}${dimClass}${selectedClass}" type="button" data-party-id="${cleanText(party.id)}" aria-pressed="${isSelected ? "true" : "false"}">
        <span class="party-logo">${logoHtml(party)}</span>
        <span class="party-logo-name">${cleanText(party.party)}</span>
        <span class="party-logo-score">${cleanText(score)}</span>
      </button>
    `;
  }

  function popupColumnCount(partyCount) {
    return Math.max(1, Math.ceil(partyCount / 2));
  }

  function areaPopupHtml(areaId) {
    const areaParties = partiesForArea(areaId);
    const partyColumns = popupColumnCount(areaParties.length);
    const activeLabel = activeFilter === "all"
      ? dimensionLabels[activeDimension]
      : `${dimensionLabels[activeDimension]} · ${activeFilter}${activeDimension === "all" ? " in any dimension" : ""}`;
    const partyWord = areaParties.length === 1 ? "party" : "parties";
    return `
      <div class="area-party-popup" data-area-popup="${cleanText(areaId)}" style="--party-columns: ${partyColumns};">
        <div class="area-popup-head">
          <div>
            <h3>${cleanText(areaLabels[areaId])}</h3>
            <p>${areaParties.length} ${partyWord} · ${cleanText(activeLabel)}</p>
            <p class="selection-help">Click party logos to select up to ${maxComparedParties} for comparison.</p>
          </div>
          <button class="area-close" type="button" aria-label="Close ${cleanText(areaLabels[areaId])}" data-close-area="${cleanText(areaId)}">&times;</button>
        </div>
        <div class="party-logo-grid">
          ${areaParties.map(logoCardHtml).join("")}
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  function scoreSummary(party) {
    return [
      `Physical: ${party.physical_level}`,
      `Formalisation: ${party.formalisation_level}`,
      `Incorporation: ${party.incorporation_level}`,
      `Digital: ${party.digital_level}`
    ].join(" · ");
  }

  function scoreMeterHtml(level) {
    const value = scoreValues[level] || 0;
    return `
      <div class="score-meter" aria-hidden="true">
        <span class="score-segment low${value >= 1 ? " active" : ""}"></span>
        <span class="score-segment medium${value >= 2 ? " active" : ""}"></span>
        <span class="score-segment high${value >= 3 ? " active" : ""}"></span>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  function scoreRowHtml(party, dimensionKey, label) {
    const level = party[dimensionKey] || "unknown";
    return `
      <div class="score-row">
        <div class="score-row-top">
          <span class="score-label">${cleanText(label)}</span>
          <span class="score-pill ${cleanText(level)}">${cleanText(level)}</span>
        </div>
        ${scoreMeterHtml(level)}
      </div>
    `;
  }

  function radarChartHtml(party) {
    const center = 100;
    const maxRadius = 54;
    const axes = [
      { key: "physical_level", label: "Physical", angle: -90 },
      { key: "formalisation_level", label: "Formal.", angle: 0 },
      { key: "incorporation_level", label: "Incorp.", angle: 90 },
      { key: "digital_level", label: "Digital", angle: 180 }
    ];
    const pointFor = (angle, value, radius = maxRadius) => {
      const radians = angle * Math.PI / 180;
      const scaled = radius * value / 3;
      return {
        x: center + scaled * Math.cos(radians),
        y: center + scaled * Math.sin(radians)
      };
    };
    const ringPolygon = level => axes
      .map(axis => pointFor(axis.angle, level))
      .map(point => `${point.x.toFixed(1)},${point.y.toFixed(1)}`)
      .join(" ");
    const dataPoints = axes.map(axis => pointFor(axis.angle, scoreValues[party[axis.key]] || 0));
    const dataPolygon = dataPoints.map(point => `${point.x.toFixed(1)},${point.y.toFixed(1)}`).join(" ");
    const labels = axes.map(axis => {
      const point = pointFor(axis.angle, 3, 73);
      return `<text class="radar-label" x="${point.x.toFixed(1)}" y="${(point.y + 3).toFixed(1)}">${cleanText(axis.label)}</text>`;
    }).join("");
    const axisLines = axes.map(axis => {
      const point = pointFor(axis.angle, 3);
      return `<line class="radar-axis" x1="${center}" y1="${center}" x2="${point.x.toFixed(1)}" y2="${point.y.toFixed(1)}"></line>`;
    }).join("");
    const points = dataPoints.map(point =>
      `<circle class="radar-point" cx="${point.x.toFixed(1)}" cy="${point.y.toFixed(1)}" r="3"></circle>`
    ).join("");

    return `
      <div class="radar-card">
        <p class="radar-title">Four-dimension profile</p>
        <svg class="radar-chart" viewBox="0 0 200 200" role="img" aria-label="Radar chart of party scores across four dimensions">
          <polygon class="radar-grid" points="${ringPolygon(1)}"></polygon>
          <polygon class="radar-grid" points="${ringPolygon(2)}"></polygon>
          <polygon class="radar-grid" points="${ringPolygon(3)}"></polygon>
          ${axisLines}
          <polygon class="radar-area" points="${dataPolygon}"></polygon>
          ${points}
          ${labels}
        </svg>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  function partyProfileHtml(party) {
    const note = party.notes && party.notes !== "NA"
      ? party.notes
      : "Placeholder for constituency links, branches abroad, formal liaisons, mobilisation practices and supporting evidence.";
    return `
      <div class="score-profile">
        ${scoreDimensions.map(([key, label]) => scoreRowHtml(party, key, label)).join("")}
        ${radarChartHtml(party)}
        <p class="party-note">${cleanText(note)}</p>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  function setPartyDetail(party) {
    setDetailTitle(partyTitleHtml(party), true);
    document.getElementById("detail-meta").textContent = "";
    document.getElementById("detail-meta").style.display = "none";
    document.getElementById("detail-body").innerHTML = partyProfileHtml(party);
    resizeDetailPanel();
  }

  function selectedParties() {
    return selectedPartyIds
      .map(id => parties.find(party => party.id === id))
      .filter(Boolean);
  }

  function comparisonPartyHtml(party) {
    const areaId = partyAreaId(party);
    const logo = party.logo_path
      ? `<img class="comparison-logo" src="${cleanText(party.logo_path)}" alt="${cleanText(party.party)} logo">`
      : `<span class="comparison-logo fallback-logo">${cleanText(party.party_abbr || party.party.slice(0, 3))}</span>`;
    return `
      <button class="comparison-party" type="button" data-party-id="${cleanText(party.id)}" aria-pressed="true" aria-label="Remove ${cleanText(party.party)} from comparison">
        ${logo}
        <span class="area-flag ${areaFlagClass(areaId)}" aria-hidden="true"></span>
        <span class="comparison-name">${cleanText(party.party)}</span>
        <span class="comparison-area">${cleanText(areaLabels[areaId] || party.country)}</span>
      </button>
    `;
  }

  function comparisonRowHtml(partiesToCompare, dimensionKey, label) {
    return `
      <div class="comparison-row">
        <span class="comparison-dimension">${cleanText(label)}</span>
        ${partiesToCompare.map(party => {
          const level = party[dimensionKey] || "unknown";
          return `<span class="score-pill ${cleanText(level)}">${cleanText(level)}</span>`;
        }).join("")}
      </div>
    `;
  }

  function comparisonRadarChartHtml(partiesToCompare) {
```
