```{=html}
    const center = 100;
    const maxRadius = 54;
    const axes = [
      { key: "physical_level", label: "Physical", angle: -90 },
      { key: "formalisation_level", label: "Formal.", angle: 0 },
      { key: "incorporation_level", label: "Incorp.", angle: 90 },
      { key: "digital_level", label: "Digital", angle: 180 }
    ];
    const pointFor = (angle, value, radius = maxRadius) => {
      const radians = angle * Math.PI / 180;
      const scaled = radius * value / 3;
      return {
        x: center + scaled * Math.cos(radians),
        y: center + scaled * Math.sin(radians)
      };
    };
    const ringPolygon = level => axes
      .map(axis => pointFor(axis.angle, level))
      .map(point => `${point.x.toFixed(1)},${point.y.toFixed(1)}`)
      .join(" ");
    const labels = axes.map(axis => {
      const point = pointFor(axis.angle, 3, 73);
      return `<text class="radar-label" x="${point.x.toFixed(1)}" y="${(point.y + 3).toFixed(1)}">${cleanText(axis.label)}</text>`;
    }).join("");
    const axisLines = axes.map(axis => {
      const point = pointFor(axis.angle, 3);
      return `<line class="radar-axis" x1="${center}" y1="${center}" x2="${point.x.toFixed(1)}" y2="${point.y.toFixed(1)}"></line>`;
    }).join("");
    const partyPolygons = partiesToCompare.map((party, index) => {
      const color = comparisonColors[index % comparisonColors.length];
      const dash = comparisonDashPatterns[index % comparisonDashPatterns.length];
      const points = axes.map(axis => pointFor(axis.angle, scoreValues[party[axis.key]] || 0));
      const polygon = points.map(point => `${point.x.toFixed(1)},${point.y.toFixed(1)}`).join(" ");
      const markers = points.map(point =>
        `<circle class="comparison-radar-point" cx="${point.x.toFixed(1)}" cy="${point.y.toFixed(1)}" r="3.2" fill="${color}"></circle>`
      ).join("");
      const dashAttr = dash ? ` stroke-dasharray="${dash}"` : "";
      return `
        <polygon class="comparison-radar-area" points="${polygon}" fill="${color}" stroke="${color}"${dashAttr}></polygon>
        ${markers}
      `;
    }).join("");
    const legend = partiesToCompare.map((party, index) => {
      const color = comparisonColors[index % comparisonColors.length];
      return `
        <span class="comparison-radar-key" title="${cleanText(party.party)}">
          <span class="comparison-radar-swatch" style="background: ${color};"></span>
          <span class="comparison-radar-name">${cleanText(party.party)}</span>
        </span>
      `;
    }).join("");

    return `
      <div class="radar-card comparison-radar-card">
        <p class="radar-title">Four-dimension comparison</p>
        <svg class="radar-chart" viewBox="0 0 200 200" role="img" aria-label="Radar chart comparing selected parties across four dimensions">
          <polygon class="radar-grid" points="${ringPolygon(1)}"></polygon>
          <polygon class="radar-grid" points="${ringPolygon(2)}"></polygon>
          <polygon class="radar-grid" points="${ringPolygon(3)}"></polygon>
          ${axisLines}
          ${partyPolygons}
          ${labels}
        </svg>
        <div class="comparison-radar-legend">
          ${legend}
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  function comparisonProfileHtml(partiesToCompare) {
    return `
      <div class="comparison-profile" style="--comparison-count: ${Math.min(partiesToCompare.length, maxComparedParties)};">
        <p class="comparison-mode-note">Compare mode: ${partiesToCompare.length}/${maxComparedParties} selected. Click a selected party pane below to remove it, or select another party logo from a country/region window to add it.</p>
        <div class="comparison-parties">
          ${partiesToCompare.map(comparisonPartyHtml).join("")}
        </div>
        ${comparisonRadarChartHtml(partiesToCompare)}
        <div class="comparison-table">
          ${scoreDimensions.map(([key, label]) => comparisonRowHtml(partiesToCompare, key, label)).join("")}
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  function renderPartySelectionDetail() {
    syncComparisonLayout();
    const partiesToShow = selectedParties();
    if (partiesToShow.length === 0) {
      setSelectedAreasDetail();
      return;
    }
    if (partiesToShow.length === 1) {
      setPartyDetail(partiesToShow[0]);
      return;
    }
    setDetailTitle(`Compare parties (${partiesToShow.length}/${maxComparedParties})`, true);
    document.getElementById("detail-meta").textContent = "";
    document.getElementById("detail-meta").style.display = "none";
    document.getElementById("detail-body").innerHTML = comparisonProfileHtml(partiesToShow);
    bindComparisonPartyClicks();
    resizeDetailPanel();
  }

  function selectedAreas() {
    return areaOrder.filter(areaId => selectedAreaIds.has(areaId));
  }

  function partiesForSelection() {
    const selected = selectedAreas();
    return parties
      .filter(party => selected.includes(partyAreaId(party)))
      .filter(partyMatchesActiveFilter)
      .sort((a, b) => {
        const areaDiff = areaOrder.indexOf(partyAreaId(a)) - areaOrder.indexOf(partyAreaId(b));
        if (areaDiff !== 0) return areaDiff;
        return String(a.party).localeCompare(String(b.party));
      });
  }

  function selectionPartyRowHtml(party) {
    const level = partyActiveScoreLabel(party);
    const levelClass = partyActiveScoreClass(party);
    return `
      <div class="selection-party-row">
        <div class="selection-party-top">
          <span class="selection-party-name">${cleanText(party.party)}</span>
          <span class="score-pill ${cleanText(levelClass)}">${cleanText(level)}</span>
        </div>
        <span class="selection-party-area">${cleanText(areaLabels[partyAreaId(party)] || party.country)}</span>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  function aggregateDimensionsForSelection() {
    if (activeDimension === "all") return scoreDimensions;
    return scoreDimensions.filter(([key]) => key === activeDimension);
  }

  function aggregateRowHtml(areaParties, dimensionKey, label) {
    const counts = { low: 0, medium: 0, high: 0 };
    areaParties.forEach(party => {
      const level = party[dimensionKey];
      if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(counts, level)) counts[level] += 1;
    });
    const total = counts.low + counts.medium + counts.high;
    const width = level => total > 0 ? ((counts[level] / total) * 100).toFixed(2) : "0";
    const filteredClass = activeFilter === "all" ? "" : " filtered";
    const countLabel = activeFilter === "all"
      ? `L ${counts.low} · M ${counts.medium} · H ${counts.high}`
      : `${counts[activeFilter]} ${activeFilter} of ${total}`;
    return `
      <div class="aggregate-row">
        <div class="aggregate-row-head">
          <span class="aggregate-dimension">${cleanText(label)}</span>
          <span class="aggregate-counts">${cleanText(countLabel)}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="aggregate-stack${filteredClass}" aria-label="${cleanText(label)}: ${counts.low} low, ${counts.medium} medium, ${counts.high} high">
          <span class="aggregate-segment low${activeFilter === "low" ? " active" : ""}" style="width: ${width("low")}%;"></span>
          <span class="aggregate-segment medium${activeFilter === "medium" ? " active" : ""}" style="width: ${width("medium")}%;"></span>
          <span class="aggregate-segment high${activeFilter === "high" ? " active" : ""}" style="width: ${width("high")}%;"></span>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  function aggregateCardHtml(areaId) {
    const areaParties = partiesForArea(areaId);
    const matchingParties = areaParties.filter(partyMatchesActiveFilter);
    const totalLabel = activeFilter === "all"
      ? `${areaParties.length} parties`
      : `${matchingParties.length} of ${areaParties.length} parties`;
    const rows = aggregateDimensionsForSelection();
    return `
      <div class="aggregate-card">
        <div class="aggregate-card-title">
          <span>${cleanText(areaLabels[areaId])}</span>
          <span class="aggregate-total">${cleanText(totalLabel)}</span>
        </div>
        <div class="aggregate-bars">
          ${rows.map(([key, label]) => aggregateRowHtml(areaParties, key, label)).join("")}
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  function aggregateSummaryHtml(areaIds) {
    if (areaIds.length === 0) return "";
    return `
      <div class="aggregate-section" aria-label="Country and region score aggregates">
        ${areaIds.map(aggregateCardHtml).join("")}
      </div>
    `;
  }

  function selectionSummaryHtml(areaIds) {
    return `
      <div class="selection-summary">
        ${aggregateSummaryHtml(areaIds)}
      </div>
    `;
  }

  function setAreaDetail(areaId) {
    if (selectedPartyIds.length > 0) return;
    const areaParties = partiesForArea(areaId);
    setDetailTitle(cleanText(areaLabels[areaId]));
    document.getElementById("detail-meta").style.display = "";
    document.getElementById("detail-meta").textContent =
      `${areaParties.length} parties · ${dimensionLabels[activeDimension]}${activeFilter === "all" ? "" : " · " + activeFilter + (activeDimension === "all" ? " in any dimension" : "")}`;
    document.getElementById("detail-body").textContent =
      "The selection box lists parties alphabetically. Clicking a party selects or deselects its score profile here.";
    resizeDetailPanel();
  }

  function setSelectedAreasDetail() {
    syncComparisonLayout();
    if (selectedPartyIds.length > 0) return;
    const selected = selectedAreas();
    if (selected.length === 0) {
      resetDetail();
      return;
    }
    const matchingParties = partiesForSelection();
    const labels = selected.map(areaId => areaLabels[areaId]).join(", ");
    setDetailTitle("Country / Region aggregates");
    document.getElementById("detail-meta").style.display = "";
    document.getElementById("detail-meta").textContent =
      `${labels} · ${dimensionLabels[activeDimension]} · ${activeFilter === "all" ? "all levels" : activeFilter + (activeDimension === "all" ? " in any dimension" : "")} · ${matchingParties.length} parties`;
    document.getElementById("detail-body").innerHTML = selectionSummaryHtml(selected);
    resizeDetailPanel();
  }

  function resetDetail() {
    selectedPartyIds = [];
    syncComparisonLayout();
    setDetailTitle("Selection data");
    document.getElementById("detail-meta").style.display = "";
    document.getElementById("detail-meta").textContent = "Interactive selection summary";
    document.getElementById("detail-body").textContent = "This window summarises the parties shown by the selected countries or regions, score dimension and score level. Select one party to see its four-dimension profile, or select up to five parties to compare their scores side by side.";
    resizeDetailPanel();
  }

  function clearPartySelections() {
    selectedPartyIds = [];
    syncComparisonLayout();
    renderAreaPopups();
    setSelectedAreasDetail();
  }

  function leavePartySelectionMode() {
    if (selectedPartyIds.length === 0) return;
    selectedPartyIds = [];
    syncComparisonLayout();
  }

  function bindComparisonPartyClicks() {
    document.querySelectorAll(".comparison-party").forEach(card => {
      card.addEventListener("click", event => {
        event.preventDefault();
        event.stopPropagation();
        const party = parties.find(item => item.id === card.dataset.partyId);
        if (party) togglePartySelection(party);
      });
    });
  }

  function togglePartySelection(party) {
    if (selectedPartyIds.includes(party.id)) {
      selectedPartyIds = selectedPartyIds.filter(id => id !== party.id);
      renderAreaPopups();
      renderPartySelectionDetail();
      return;
    }
    activeDimension = "all";
    activeFilter = "all";
    selectedPartyIds = [...selectedPartyIds, party.id].slice(-maxComparedParties);
    applyFilter();
    renderAreaPopups();
    renderPartySelectionDetail();
  }

  function bindPopupLogoClicks() {
    document.querySelectorAll(".party-logo-card").forEach(card => {
      card.addEventListener("click", event => {
        event.preventDefault();
        event.stopPropagation();
        const party = parties.find(item => item.id === card.dataset.partyId);
        if (party) togglePartySelection(party);
      });
    });
    document.querySelectorAll(".area-close").forEach(button => {
      button.addEventListener("click", event => {
        event.preventDefault();
        event.stopPropagation();
        const closingArea = button.dataset.closeArea;
        selectedPartyIds = selectedPartyIds.filter(id => {
          const selectedParty = parties.find(item => item.id === id);
          return selectedParty && partyAreaId(selectedParty) !== closingArea;
        });
        selectedAreaIds.delete(closingArea);
        updateSelectionDisplay();
      });
    });
  }

  function renderAreaPopups() {
    const host = document.getElementById("area-popups");
    const selected = areaOrder.filter(areaId => selectedAreaIds.has(areaId));
    const rows = selected.length <= 1
      ? [selected]
      : selected.length === 2
        ? [[selected[0]], [selected[1]]]
        : [selected.slice(0, 2), selected.slice(2, 4)];
    host.innerHTML = rows
      .filter(row => row.length > 0)
      .map(row => `<div class="popup-row">${row.map(areaPopupHtml).join("")}</div>`)
      .join("");
    bindPopupLogoClicks();
  }

  function updateSelectionDisplay() {
    refreshAreaStyles();
    renderAreaPopups();
    if (selectedPartyIds.length > 0) {
      renderPartySelectionDetail();
    } else {
      setSelectedAreasDetail();
    }
  }

  function toggleArea(areaId) {
    leavePartySelectionMode();
    if (selectedAreaIds.has(areaId)) {
      selectedAreaIds.delete(areaId);
    } else {
      selectedAreaIds.add(areaId);
    }
    updateSelectionDisplay();
  }

  function applyFilter() {
    document.querySelectorAll(".filter-button").forEach(button => {
      button.classList.toggle("active", button.dataset.filter === activeFilter);
    });

    document.querySelectorAll(".dimension-button").forEach(button => {
      button.classList.toggle("active", button.dataset.dimension === activeDimension);
    });

    renderAreaPopups();
    if (selectedPartyIds.length > 0) {
      renderPartySelectionDetail();
    } else {
      setSelectedAreasDetail();
    }
  }

  function clearAllSelections() {
    selectedAreaIds.clear();
    selectedPartyIds = [];
    activeFilter = "all";
    applyFilter();
    updateSelectionDisplay();
  }

  function selectAllAreas() {
    leavePartySelectionMode();
    areaOrder.forEach(areaId => selectedAreaIds.add(areaId));
    updateSelectionDisplay();
  }

  function resizeDetailPanel() {
    const panel = document.getElementById("selection-data-panel");
    if (!panel) return;
    if (window.matchMedia("(max-width: 760px)").matches) {
      panel.style.removeProperty("--data-panel-height");
      return;
    }
    const rect = panel.getBoundingClientRect();
    const visibleHeight = Math.max(360, Math.min(1040, window.innerHeight - rect.top - 12));
    panel.style.setProperty("--data-panel-height", `${visibleHeight}px`);
  }

  function enableDetailPanelWheelScroll() {
    const panel = document.getElementById("selection-data-panel");
    if (!panel) return;
    resizeDetailPanel();
    window.addEventListener("resize", resizeDetailPanel);
    window.addEventListener("scroll", resizeDetailPanel, { passive: true });
    panel.addEventListener("wheel", event => {
      resizeDetailPanel();
      const maxScroll = panel.scrollHeight - panel.clientHeight;
      if (maxScroll <= 0) return;
      const nextScroll = Math.max(0, Math.min(maxScroll, panel.scrollTop + event.deltaY));
      event.preventDefault();
      event.stopPropagation();
      panel.scrollTop = nextScroll;
    }, { passive: false });
  }

  function enableMapPopupWheelScroll() {
    const stage = document.getElementById("map-stage");
    const popups = document.getElementById("area-popups");
    if (!stage || !popups) return;
    stage.addEventListener("wheel", event => {
      if (selectedAreaIds.size === 0 || !popups.innerHTML.trim()) return;
      const maxY = popups.scrollHeight - popups.clientHeight;
      const maxX = popups.scrollWidth - popups.clientWidth;
      if (maxY <= 0 && maxX <= 0) return;
      event.preventDefault();
      event.stopPropagation();
      if (Math.abs(event.deltaX) > Math.abs(event.deltaY) && maxX > 0) {
        popups.scrollLeft = Math.max(0, Math.min(maxX, popups.scrollLeft + event.deltaX));
        return;
      }
      if (maxY > 0) {
        popups.scrollTop = Math.max(0, Math.min(maxY, popups.scrollTop + event.deltaY));
      } else if (maxX > 0) {
        popups.scrollLeft = Math.max(0, Math.min(maxX, popups.scrollLeft + event.deltaY));
      }
    }, { passive: false });
  }

  const infoWindows = {
    author: {
      title: "Author details",
      body: `
        <section class="window-section">
          <h2>Adrian Favero</h2>
          <p>Adrian Favero is Assistant Professor in European Politics and Society at the University of Groningen.</p>
        </section>
        <section class="window-section">
          <h2>Research Focus</h2>
          <p>His research focuses on (transnational) party organisation, right-wing populism within and across Europe, as well as attitudes towards the EU.</p>
        </section>
        <section class="window-section link-section">
          <h2>Profile</h2>
          <p><a href="https://www.rug.nl/staff/a.v.favero/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">University of Groningen staff profile</a></p>
        </section>
      `
    },
    output: {
      title: "Related output",
      body: `
        <section class="window-section">
          <h2>Publications and Commentary</h2>
          <ol class="reference-list">
            <li>
              <span class="reference-title">How to reach external citizens? Comparing varieties of transnational party infrastructure</span>
              <span class="reference-meta">Favero, A. (2025). <em>Acta Politica</em> 60, 594-620.</span>
              <a href="https://doi.org/10.1057/s41269-024-00344-8" target="_blank" rel="noopener">https://doi.org/10.1057/s41269-024-00344-8</a>
            </li>
            <li>
              <span class="reference-title">National parties' strategies for mobilising expat voters</span>
              <span class="reference-meta">Favero, A. and Pittoors G. (2025). <em>The Loop</em>.</span>
              <a href="https://theloop.ecpr.eu/national-parties-strategies-for-mobilising-expat-voters/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">https://theloop.ecpr.eu/national-parties-strategies-for-mobilising-expat-voters/</a>
            </li>
          </ol>
        </section>
      `
    },
    acknowledgements: {
      title: "Acknowledgements",
      body: `
        <section class="window-section">
          <h2>Project</h2>
          <p>This dashboard is part of the project <em>Engaging with the diaspora: evaluating the transnational organisations of political parties</em>, file number 406.XS.25.01.029 of the research programme SSH Open Competition XS, (partly) financed by the Dutch Research Council (NWO).</p>
          <p><a href="https://doi.org/10.61686/BEUYM07212" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Grant DOI: https://doi.org/10.61686/BEUYM07212</a></p>
        </section>
        <section class="window-section">
          <h2>Thanks</h2>
          <p>I also would like to thank Dr Gilles Pittoors for his fantastic co-authorship and Dr Stefan Couperus for turning the raw data into a dashboard.</p>
        </section>
      `
    }
  };

  function openInfoWindow(key) {
    const datasetUrl = "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1ZG3Y5IDDto0S7solvIKbrdOGz_SLHt7Y/edit?gid=744339735#gid=744339735";
    if (key === "dataset") {
      window.open(datasetUrl, "_blank", "noopener");
      return;
    }
    const item = infoWindows[key];
    if (!item) return;
    const modal = document.getElementById("info-modal");
    const title = document.getElementById("info-modal-title");
    const body = document.getElementById("info-modal-body");
    const closeButton = modal ? modal.querySelector(".info-modal-close") : null;
    if (!modal || !title || !body) return;
    title.textContent = item.title;
    body.innerHTML = item.body;
    modal.classList.add("open");
    modal.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "false");
    if (closeButton) closeButton.focus();
  }

  function closeInfoWindow() {
    const modal = document.getElementById("info-modal");
    if (!modal) return;
    modal.classList.remove("open");
    modal.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "true");
  }

  document.querySelectorAll(".filter-button").forEach(button => {
    button.addEventListener("click", () => {
      leavePartySelectionMode();
      activeFilter = button.dataset.filter;
      applyFilter();
    });
  });

  document.querySelectorAll(".dimension-button").forEach(button => {
    button.addEventListener("click", () => {
      leavePartySelectionMode();
      activeDimension = button.dataset.dimension;
      if (activeDimension === "all") activeFilter = "all";
      applyFilter();
    });
  });

  document.querySelectorAll(".area-button").forEach(button => {
    button.addEventListener("click", () => toggleArea(button.dataset.area));
  });

  document.querySelectorAll(".info-button").forEach(button => {
    button.addEventListener("click", () => openInfoWindow(button.dataset.infoWindow));
  });

  let popupResizeTimer = null;
  window.addEventListener("resize", () => {
    window.clearTimeout(popupResizeTimer);
    popupResizeTimer = window.setTimeout(() => {
      if (selectedAreaIds.size > 0) renderAreaPopups();
      resizeDetailPanel();
    }, 120);
  });

  document.querySelectorAll("[data-info-close]").forEach(button => {
    button.addEventListener("click", closeInfoWindow);
  });

  document.addEventListener("keydown", event => {
    if (event.key === "Escape") closeInfoWindow();
  });

  document.getElementById("select-all-areas-button").addEventListener("click", selectAllAreas);
  document.getElementById("clear-selection-button").addEventListener("click", clearAllSelections);
  enableDetailPanelWheelScroll();
  enableMapPopupWheelScroll();
</script>
```
